rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"X-RateLimit-Reset header expects an absolute Unix timestamp in ms (Date.now()), but retryAfterMs is a duration. Use Date.now() + retryAfterMs, not just retryAfterMs.","scope":"src/middleware/rateLimit.ts:55"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Middleware files live in src/middleware/ and co-located tests use the .test.ts suffix in the same directory.","scope":"src/middleware"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Follow the factory pattern: createXxxMiddleware(config) returning a NextResponse | undefined, with destroy() on the limiter for cleanup.","scope":"src/middleware"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Tests use afterEach with vi.useRealTimers() after timer-based tests and call limiter.destroy() for cleanup.","scope":"src/middleware"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When adding a new file that overlaps with an existing one (rate-limiter vs rateLimit), name it distinctly and mirror the existing patterns to avoid reviewers second-guessing intent.","s
